Package kafe

Class BaseThen<R>

java.lang.Object
kafe.BaseCheck<R>
kafe.BaseThen<R>
public abstract class BaseThen<R> extends BaseCheck<R>
BaseThen extends BaseCheck to support BDD pattern. It reuses all Check functionality but with BDD naming.
